author: Kendra Barnett
title: A Guide to the New, Wide World of Agentic Advertising and Commerce Protocols
description: As AI agents flood the web, a fast-growing maze of protocols—from MCP and A2A to AdCP, UCP, and TAP—is emerging to power how bots buy ads, make payments, and transact online.
content: The future of brands gets decided here. Join the industry’s top marketers at Brandweek for the ideas, insights, and connections shaping what’s next. Get your ticket.Over the last year and a half, the… [+11653 chars]
